examples: Her jewellery sparkled in the candlelight.
I move close to the candlelight to see what I have.
The blindfold was removed and I stood next to her, inches between us, facing a mirror in candlelight.
Hawkers are still selling, their lanterns illuminating the streets like a stalled candlelight procession.
Around 80% turned out, some queuing for over 12 hours and then voting by candlelight.
